original_abstract: This research explores the planning, implementation, and evaluation of internalizing Islamic educational values to build student character at SD Inpres 2 Wagom. Using a descriptive qualitative approach, data were gathered through interviews with the school principal and teachers, direct observations, and documentation. The analysis followed a systematic process of data reduction, display, and verification to ensure a comprehensive understanding of the school's educational environment. The findings reveal that the internalization process is deeply integrated into the curriculum and daily school culture, employing strategies such as problem-based learning and routine spiritual practices like the Dhuha prayer and habitual acts of respect. The study concludes that successful character formation at SD Inpres 2 Wagom is measured by the depth of students' understanding and the consistent application of Islamic principles in their daily behavior, supported by strong collaboration between educators and parents.
humanized_abstract: The objective of this research is to see how the process of planning, realizing, and evaluating internalizing Islamic educational values for the purpose of nurturing student character at SD Inpres 2 Wagom is carried out. With the descriptive qualitative method as its research approach, the data that has been obtained from the results of the interviews with the headmaster and teachers, which is then used in combination with direct observation of the material taught to students in class and in the form of documentation about the activity of schools carried out to improve student character. Then after all the data have been collected and are ready to be analyzed with a scientific analysis process, consisting of the reduction, development, and verification in order to enable researchers to obtain findings about the educational atmosphere that exists at the time when the Islamic educational values are introduced in SD Inpres 2 Wagom, so that it will have an added value for the efforts made to improve the character of students by conducting the activities of improving student character undertaken by teachers and also involving other relevant parties, especially parents, and this can be proven by the implementation and assessment of internalizing values that in fact indicate the process and the level of attainment of student character built by students at SD Inpres 2 Wagom which reflects the degree of depth of students understanding the concept of character, especially that of an Islamic nature which must always be implemented maximally by students through the cooperation that is achieved between teachers and parents.
